author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The dome of Pachycephalosaurus was surrounded by small bony spikes and knobs, giving its head a highly decorated appearance.
Pachycephalosaurus was famous for its dome-shaped skull, which was up to 9 inches (22 cm) thick and made of solid bone.
